testsuite.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro
testcase.classname: Fazer busca de destinos IDA com 1 passageiro

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 90000ms: Expected to find element: `button.outer-seat[id^="seat-"]:not(:has(.occupied-seat))`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 90000ms: Expected to find element: `button.outer-seat[id^="seat-"]:not(:has(.occupied-seat))`, but never found it. at Context.eval (webpack://cypress-treino/./cypress/support/commands.js:71:5) at wrapped (https://www.viacaocometa.com.br/__cypress/runner/cypress_runner.js:146279:43)

testcase.name: Fazer busca de destinos, selecionar datas, compra de passagens, selecionar assentos e finalizar compra Fazer busca de destinos IDA e Volta com 2 passageiros
testcase.classname: Fazer busca de destinos IDA e Volta com 2 passageiros

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 20050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element:
`<input autocomplete="off" title="Nome completo....." class="input-name focusable" id="input-name-2" type="text" data-js="input-name-2" minlength="6" maxlength="45" required="required" placeholder="Nome completo.....">`
is being covered by another element:
`<article>...</article>`
Fix this problem, or use {force: true} to disable error checking.
https://on.cypress.io/element-cannot-be-interacted-with

testcase.failure:
CypressError: Timed out retrying after 20050ms: `cy.click()` failed because this element:
`<input autocomplete="off" title="Nome completo....." class="input-name focusable" id="input-name-2" type="text" data-js="input-name-2" minlength="6" maxlength="45" required="required" placeholder="Nome completo.....">`
is being covered by another element:
`<article>...</article>`
Fix this problem, or use {force: true} to disable error checking.
